objective: Find source-traced MCP/tool/API candidates for selecting a read-only capability discovery helper.
query: AI capability discovery MCP tool with source traces and pre-use trust routing

candidates.name: AI Objective Index read-only MCP tools
candidates.why_relevant: Matches objective-to-capability discovery and returns source traces, missing fields, and decision receipts.
candidates.next_action: Run preflight before any recommendation or tool use; keep output read-only until permission scope is explicit.
must_not_claim: AOI clears legal, privacy, license, or compliance status
AOI proves product readiness or quality

candidates.name: AgentSec local manifest review
candidates.why_relevant: Useful when the candidate is a tool or MCP manifest and an agent needs permission or hidden-instruction review.
candidates.next_action: Request an owner-provided local manifest and run only local/offline review.
must_not_claim: AOI clears legal, privacy, license, or compliance status
AOI proves product readiness or quality

candidates.name: DataCapsule local corpus manifest review
candidates.why_relevant: Useful when the objective depends on dataset, corpus, privacy, rights, or eval-leakage boundaries.
candidates.next_action: Ask for a local corpus manifest; do not inspect raw private data or authorize training/action use.
must_not_claim: AOI clears legal, privacy, license, or compliance status
AOI proves product readiness or quality

freshness.stale_warning: sample data is static and should be refreshed before external use

capability_decision_packet.objective: Find source-traced MCP/tool/API candidates for selecting a read-only capability discovery helper.
capability_decision_packet.capability_name: AI Objective Index read-only MCP tools
capability_decision_packet.safe_next_action: Request missing evidence, downgrade to read/draft, or use HOLD-to-Replan before any execution.
must_not_claim: AOI clears legal, privacy, license, or compliance status
AOI proves product readiness or quality
claim_ceiling: route_decision does not imply security certification
route_decision does not imply product readiness
route_decision does not imply action authorization
capability_decision_packet.stale_warning: Source traces should be refreshed before execution or external-facing recommendation.
capability_decision_packet.recheck_policy: Recheck on version change, stale trace warning, negative cache hit, or before execution.
